sources.title: Self-driving truck startup Einride raises $113M PIPE ahead of public debut
sources.claim: Einride raises $113M PIPE oversubscribed; IPO expected H1 2026; $500M+ total raised; electric autonomous pod fleet

sources.title: Aurora Innovation Annual Report FY2025
sources.claim: Commercial driverless launch April 2025; 250,000+ driverless miles; zero Aurora Driver-attributed collisions; $14-16M 2026 revenue guidance; 200+ trucks target by year-end; customers include Uber Freight, FedEx, Werner, Schneider

sources.title: Autonomous trucking to put $9 billion back in U.S. consumers' pockets annually by 2035
sources.claim: Independent study: autonomous freight delivers $9B annual consumer savings, 490 deaths prevented, 82% fewer injury crashes vs human drivers by 2035

sources.title: Aurora Expands Driverless Trucking Service from Fort Worth to El Paso
sources.claim: Aurora triples driverless network to 10 Sun Belt routes in February 2026; validates 1,000-mile Fort Worth–Phoenix lane; 4.5M+ cumulative commercial miles

sources.title: The 2026 SELF DRIVE Act Heads to Committee Markup This Week
sources.claim: Bipartisan SELF DRIVE Act (Latta/Dingell) preempts state restrictions; creates first national autonomous truck safety framework; allows revenue freight during evaluation period

sources.title: Autonomous Trucks Market (2025-2035)
sources.claim: Global autonomous truck market $47.5B in 2025, projected $185.5B by 2035 at 14.6% CAGR; North America dominant market

sources.title: Autonomous Truck Market Size, Growth Forecasts 2025-2034
sources.claim: Autonomous truck market $33B in 2023, $35.51B in 2024, growing to $47.5B by 2025; 62% of demand from logistics and freight operations

sources.title: Kodiak AI, Aurora Innovation see Q3 growth in autonomous truck market
sources.claim: Kodiak operates largest driverless fleet in Permian Basin; Aurora and Kodiak both show Q3 2025 commercial revenue growth; Kodiak targets long-haul highway deployment H2 2026

sources.title: Can driverless trucks overcome union opposition, revolutionize transportation industry?
sources.claim: Teamsters President O'Brien Congressional testimony 2025; Colorado referendum threat; 80,000 driver shortage growing to 160,000 by 2030; 17,000 jobs created by autonomous trucking in early commercial phase

sources.title: How Autonomous Trucks Could Reshape Freight Costs — and Consumer Prices
sources.claim: Autonomous trucks generate 32% fuel savings per route; 1.6B gallons fuel conservation projected annually at scale; $3.3B US economic output from AV trucking in early 2026

sources.title: The Autonomous Trucking Catalyst: Why Freight Tech Stocks Are 2026's Best Kept Secret
sources.claim: Aurora 10 Sun Belt routes; Kodiak Permian Basin; Einride IPO; 80K+ driver shortage structural driver; freight tech positioning as 2026 investment theme

sources.title: Trucking regulations forecast 2026: NOx, Motus, IC, autonomous rules
sources.claim: FMCSA finalizing ADS inspection and maintenance standards by May 2026; FMCSA AV rulemaking not expected before 2027; 2026 regulatory landscape for autonomous commercial vehicles

unverified_claims: Market share percentages for Aurora, Kodiak, Gatik, Einride, and Plus.ai are author estimates based on publicly available operational data — no independent market share breakdowns were found for the autonomous trucking ADS segment specifically.
Search volume of ~65K/mo is an estimate; no public Google Trends API data was accessed for exact monthly search volume verification.

2021 market size baseline used to calculate growth_5y (+280%) is estimated at ~$12-15B based on industry growth trajectory — exact 2021 standalone ADS market size was not confirmed by a single source.
